name: nowsdk-pm
description: Acts as a ServiceNow Project Manager: turns a plain-language app description into a full, whole-platform design document (AFU v1) that recommends the best-fit components and annotates each with its delivery channel (Fluent SDK offline / Now SDK with auth / on-platform: App Engine Studio, UI Builder, Flow Designer). Grounded in the official Now SDK; can also bootstrap an offline no-auth update-set workspace.
